results.title: 8 Top Superflow Alternatives & Competitors in 2026
results.content:
‍

## 1. Feedbucket

"For a while, I struggled with buggy tools. When I found Feedbucket, I was immediately impressed with the ease of use and reliability of the third-party integrations."

Mark Tenney

/

CEO, Digital Church

Feedbucket is a top alternative to Superflow, especially in its similar toolkit for capturing website feedback directly on-site and facilitating collaboration between team members and clients through a guest portal on the website.

A key distinction lies in how feedback is viewed and managed. Superflow has limited integrations, and those available don't support two-way communication. This means if your team uses a project management tool like Asana, ClickUp, Jira, etc., they would need to manage feedback separately. [...] ### Pricing

Marker.io offers three pricing tiers, ranging from $59 to $399 per month. The Team Plan, priced at $199 a month, is most likely what you need as an Agency. This gives you more than 5 active projects and issue-sync when using an integration.

‍

## 4. Ruttl

Ruttl offers a different approach compared to Superflow, requiring no installations on your website. It relies on proxy technology for setup, which simplifies the process but may pose challenges when giving feedback on sites with Basic Auth.

Like Superflow, Ruttl's integrations are limited, and they don't offer two-way syncing. This could be an issue if your team is already using project management tools like Jira or Asana, as it means managing feedback in an additional tool. [...] ### Pricing

Pastel offers a free tier, but it's really only suitable for hobby use. The paid plans range from $35 to $450 per month. Due to the 72-hour commenting window, you'll probably need to choose their Team plan at $119 a month.

‍

## 3. Marker.io

Marker.io competes directly with Superflow, offering a range of similar features. However, unlike Superflow, Marker.io doesn't support video feedback, which could be seen as a disadvantage.

On the plus side, Marker.io boasts strong integrations with project management tools, allowing teams to stick with their familiar tools. This is an area where Superflow falls short, especially in terms of two-way sync capabilities.

results.title: Alternatives to Shurflo water pump? - Boat Equipment - Canal World
results.content:
Does anybody have any suggestions for better pumps that don't cost the earth?

Thanks.

Keeping Up
Veteran II")

### Keeping Up

### Keeping Up

Keeping Up
Veteran II")

6 or 7 years is pretty good for a Shurflo. It was probably better made than today's Shurflo's. The Par Max range from Jabsco are better made and better priced.

George94
Experienced")

### George94

### George94

George94
Experienced")

Thanks, Allan.

I've been looking around, and coming to the view that a Whale would probably be the best (with a cost to match), but the Jabsco is, as you say, very competitively priced. And if it's also better made than the Sureflo, I will go for that.

Cheers.

Guest

# Alternatives to Shurflo water pump?

George94

By
George94  
June 27, 2013 in Boat Equipment

## Featured Posts

George94
Experienced")

### George94

### George94

George94
Experienced")

My 2.8 US gpm Shurflow AquaKing water pressure pump has started to leak. Previous threads on this pump say it is a common problem after a few years. The pump is supplied from a clean, debris-free, plastic water tank (food grade) and is always warm, so there is no cause to fail, other than age. It is 6 or 7 years old, I believe.

This sounds like either poor design/materials, or deliberate built-in obsolescence. Either way, I would like to consider alternatives before replacing/repairing it. [...] Guest

### Guest

### Guest

Guest

You can just use a 12v car auxiliary bosch pump, I picked up a couple for £1 each off broken cars. They need a pressure switch, but they're rated to 20,000 hours so last ages.

Casp'

Interesting. Could you enlarge on that a bit please, ie where are these found on cars and what purpose do they serve?

Many thanks.

smileypete
Veteran II")

### smileypete

### smileypete

smileypete
Veteran II")

Not really, I would reseal around the edge of the diaphragm with some Fernox LS-X jointing compound, should be an easy 1/2hr to 1hr job.

Also fit a relay between pressure switch and pump motor to prolong the electrical life of the pressure switch.

cheers, Pete.

~smpt~

George94
Experienced")

### George94

### George94

George94
Experienced")

The Surflo I.V. Catheters are made out of special medical grade EFTE (straight) and FEP (straight, winged , winged & injection port).

The carefully selected materials of the EFTE/FEP I.V. Catheters are designed to maintain catheter integrity, providing a stable structure that reduces the risk of split tips or peel‑back during puncture, even under challenging conditions.

results.title: Shurflo Pump Parts | Kleen-Rite
results.content:
If you require pump break down sheets to identify part numbers, please visit our resource library or the product page for that model to view documents specific to that pump. If you have determined it is time to invest in a new pump, we stock plenty of options of both Shurflo electric diaphragm pumps and Shurflo air pumps.

When the ShurFlo pump in your RV malfunctions check out our RV Water Pump Guide for some troubleshooting tips and info to help you determine the cause and identify if you need to purchase replacement parts on need a new pump.

# ShurFlo Pump Parts

We are a proud distributor of parts for Shurflo pumps. Browse a large selection of components. Whether you need a specific part or a repair kit, we are sure to have what you need! Get repair kits to service the diaphragms, check valves, switch, and many of the components of your pump. We carry parts for Shurflo’s 2088 Series and 8000 Series pumps. Plus, we stock Shurflo 12v pump parts and components for pumps of all other voltages too!
